subcommands.name: allow
subcommands.help: Remove addresses from the blacklist (like shorewall allow).

subcommands.name: blacklist
subcommands.help: Add address to dynamic blacklist with timeout (like shorewall blacklist).

subcommands.name: capabilities
subcommands.help: Detect nftables capabilities of the running kernel.

subcommands.name: check
subcommands.help: Validate config without applying (like shorewall check).

params.help: Explicit IPv6 config directory (use with --config-dir4 for dual mode).

params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v4 sibling directory.

params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v6 sibling directory.

subcommands.name: clear
subcommands.help: Clear all firewall rules (accept all traffic).

params.name: no_restore
params.help: Do not restore the original ruleset on exit.

params.name: trace_filter
params.help: Auto-install a `meta nftrace set 1` rule in the input chain for the given nft match (e.g. 'ip saddr 1.2.3.4' or 'meta l4proto icmp'). Removed on exit.

subcommands.name: restore
subcommands.help: Restore a saved ruleset (like shorewall restore).

subcommands.help: Save current ruleset (like shorewall save).

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.help: Show firewall info (like shorewall show). Subcommands: zones, policies, config, connections.

subcommands.name: simulate
subcommands.help: Run packet-level simulation in 3 network namespaces.

params.name: targets
params.help: Comma-separated list of target IPs, or @FILE with one IP per line. Bypasses --target; all targets share a single netns topology.

params.name: targets_v6
params.help: Comma-separated list or @FILE of IPv6 target addresses. Requires --ip6tables.

params.name: src_iface
params.help: Override the source-zone interface name in the firewall netns (default: bond1).

params.name: dst_iface
params.help: Override the destination-zone interface name in the firewall netns (default: bond0.20).

params.name: all_zones
params.help: Multi-zone topology: create one veth pair per zone and derive test cases across every src->dst chain in the iptables dump.

params.name: config6_dir
params.help: Explicit IPv6 config directory (use with --config-dir4 for dual mode).

params.name: no_auto_v4
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v4 sibling directory.

params.name: no_auto_v6
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v6 sibling directory.

subcommands.help: Compile and apply firewall rules (like shorewall start).

params.name: no_auto_v4
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v4 sibling directory.

params.name: no_auto_v6
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v6 sibling directory.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.help: Show firewall status.

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.help: Stop the firewall (remove all rules).

subcommands.name: trace
subcommands.help: Start live packet tracing (nft monitor trace).

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.help: Verify compiled output against iptables baseline.

params.help: Explicit IPv6 config directory (use with --config-dir4 for dual mode).

params.name: no_auto_v4
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v4 sibling directory.

params.name: no_auto_v6
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v6 sibling directory.

subcommands.name: apply-tc
subcommands.help: Apply TC (traffic control) config via pyroute2. Reads tcdevices/tcclasses/tcfilters and configures kernel qdiscs, classes, and fwmark filters directly via netlink. No tc(8) binary required. Idempotent: existing qdiscs are deleted then re-added.

params.name: netns
params.help: Apply inside this named network namespace (pyroute2 IPRoute(netns=NAME) — no ip-netns-exec fork).

params.name: dry_run
params.help: Parse and validate the TC config then print the planned operations as a bulleted list. Nothing is applied to the kernel.

params.name: config6_dir
params.help: Explicit IPv6 config directory (use with --config-dir4 for dual mode).

params.name: no_auto_v4
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v4 sibling directory.

params.name: no_auto_v6
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v6 sibling directory.

subcommands.name: generate-conntrackd
subcommands.help: Generate a conntrackd.conf fragment for an HA firewall pair. Honours CT_ZONE_TAG_MASK to build a Mark filter that replicates only zone bits across the sync link.

params.name: sync_iface
params.help: Interface used for the conntrackd sync link. Defaults to CONNTRACKD_IFACE from shorewall.conf.

params.name: peer_ip
params.help: IPv4 address of the peer HA node on the sync link.

params.name: local_ip
params.help: IPv4 address of this node on the sync link.

params.name: cluster_ip
params.help: Shared virtual IP that HA failover moves between nodes.

params.name: config6_dir
params.help: Explicit IPv6 config directory (use with --config-dir4 for dual mode).

params.name: no_auto_v4
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v4 sibling directory.

params.name: no_auto_v6
params.help: Disable auto-detection of a v6 sibling directory.

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.help: Structured config I/O (export / import / template / merge).

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.help: Dump a Shorewall config directory as a structured JSON or YAML blob.

params.name: fmt
params.help: Output format: json (default) or yaml (requires PyYAML).

params.name: output
params.help: Write to FILE instead of stdout. Extension auto-selects yaml format when --format is not given.

params.name: include_trace
params.help: Keep _file / _lineno / _comment diagnostic fields in the output.

params.name: indent
params.help: JSON indent level (ignored for YAML; default: 2).

subcommands.name: import
subcommands.help: Validate a structured JSON/YAML config blob and optionally write it back as on-disk Shorewall files.

params.name: fmt
params.help: Input format: json, yaml, or auto (selects by file extension; default).

params.name: target
params.help: Target directory. When given, the parsed blob is written back as on-disk Shorewall files.

params.name: force
params.help: Overwrite --to target even if it is not empty.

params.name: dry_run
params.help: Parse and validate only; print a summary. Implied when --to is absent.

subcommands.name: template
subcommands.help: Expand a multi-host text template against a target host name.

params.name: output
params.help: Write to FILE instead of stdout.

subcommands.name: merge
subcommands.help: Merge one or more Shorewall config directories into a unified pretty-printed output directory.

params.name: target
params.help: Target directory for the merged output. Required.

params.name: force
params.help: Overwrite --to even if it exists and is non-empty.

params.name: provenance
params.help: Interleave # from <file>:<lineno> comments before each rule.

params.name: config_dir_v6
params.help: Optional v6 sibling for the first source directory.
